mapper.insert: INSERT INTO media.upload_intents (id, owner_user_id, object_key, status, expires_at, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{ownerUserId}, #{objectKey}, #{status}, #{expiresAt}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, owner_user_id, object_key, status, media_file_id, expires_at, created_at, completed_at FROM media.upload_intents WHERE owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} AND object_key = #{objectKey} AND status = 'PENDING' FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE media.upload_intents SET status = 'PURGING' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT ui.id, ui.owner_user_id, ui.object_key, ui.status, ui.media_file_id, ui.expires_at, ui.created_at, ui.completed_at FROM media.upload_intents ui JOIN media.media_files mf ON mf.id = ui.media_file_id AND mf.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE ui.status = 'COMPLETED' AND ui.expires_at <= #{now} AND mf.linked_resource_id IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM record.trip_record_media rm WHERE rm.media_file_id = mf.id) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM community.post_media pm WHERE pm.media_file_id = mf.id) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM community.posts p WHERE p.cover_media_file_id = mf.id) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM auth.user_profiles up WHERE up.profile_media_file_id = mf.id) ORDER BY ui.expires_at LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE media.upload_intents SET status = 'PURGED' WHERE id = #{id} AND status != 'PURGED'
UPDATE media.upload_intents SET status = 'PURGED' WHERE media_file_id = #{mediaFileId} AND status != 'PURGED'
